mapper.sql: id, user_id, current_job_name, matched_job_id, matched_job_name, recommended_path_id, path_steps, current_step_index, total_steps, estimated_total_months, match_score, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.user_vertical_path_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.user_vertical_path_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_career_plan.user_vertical_path_recommendations SET current_step_index = #{stepIndex}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_career_plan.user_vertical_path_recommendations SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
